name: Reflex Plus Adult Dog Food Breed Series Maltese Terrier Hypoallergenic 2kg
shortDescription: Reflex Plus Maltese Adult Dog Food is a super-premium dry diet for dogs 10+ months. Supports joint health, digestion, immune system, skin & coat, and overall vitality.
description: Complete & Balanced Super Premium Dry Food for Maltese Dogs (10+ Months) Reflex Plus Maltese Adult Dog Food is a complete and balanced dry diet specially formulated for Maltese dogs over 10 months old. Made with high-quality animal proteins, this formula supports joint health, digestion, skin and coat condition, and overall wellbeing. With functional ingredients such as prebiotics, glucosamine, chondroitin sulfate, Aloe Vera, blueberries, and marigold extract, this food promotes immune system health, cell renewal, joint flexibility, and a shiny, healthy coat.   Fos & Mos Prebiotics : It is a natural additive that has a positive effect on maintaining immune and digestive system health. Glucosamine : It helps to maintain joint flexibility and improve joint health. Aloe Vera : It supports coat and skin health. Blueberries : It supports cell renewal and the immune system through its antioxidant properties. Marigold Extract : Supports skin and coat health. Contributes to the immune system. Chondroitin Sulfate : It helps preserve the structure of cartilage tissue injoints and supports the production of joint fluid. Key Benefits Formulated specifically for Maltese dogs (10+ months) 83% of total protein comes from premium animal ingredients Supports immune and digestive system health (FOS & MOS prebiotics) Promotes joint health and flexibility (Glucosamine & Chondroitin Sulfate) Supports skin and coat health (Aloe Vera & Marigold Extract) Antioxidant-rich formula (Blueberries) Balanced nutrition for optimal energy and vitality Ingredients Processed chicken protein (28%), Corn, Rice, Chicken fat, Hydrolyzed chicken protein, Pea protein, Fish protein, Fish oil, Fiber concentrate, Dried sugar beet, Liver flavor, Vitamins and minerals, Psyllium fiber, Dried brewer’s yeast, Brown algae, Borage oil, Blueberry, MOS (mannan-oligosaccharides), Flaxseed, Yucca schidigera, Salt, FOS (fructo-oligosaccharides), Aloe Vera, Glucosamine, Chondroitin sulfate, Marigold extract, Preservatives and antioxidants (E320 & E321). Analytical Constituents Crude Protein: 25% Crude Fat: 16% Crude Ash: 7% Crude Fibre: 3% Nutritional Supplements Vitamins: Vitamin A: 18,000 IU/kg Vitamin D3: 1,500 IU/kg Vitamin E: 200 mg/kg Vitamin C: 200 mg/kg B Vitamins (B1, B2, B3, B6, B12, Biotin, Folic Acid), Vitamin K3, Choline, Calcium Pantothenate Minerals: Iron, Iodine, Copper, Manganese, Zinc, Selenium Feeding Guidelines Feed according to body weight, activity level, and silhouette (A-Thin, B-Normal, C-Overweight) Adjust daily portions based on environment, lifestyle, temperament, and energy needs Gradually transition from one food to another over 7 days Provide clean, fresh drinking water at all times Store in a cool, dry place; close bag properly after each feeding Not suitable for human consumption Check expiration date and batch number on packaging
